vocab.meaning: mức giá cao (thường đi đôi với thương hiệu lớn)
vocab.example: While famous sneakers carry a premium price tag, the durability they offer often makes them a wise long-term investment.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ về mặt công thái học (giúp bảo vệ đôi chân)
vocab.example: I opt for established brands primarily for their superior ergonomic support, which is essential for my daily commute.

vocab.meaning: việc tiêu dùng để phô trương (mua đồ hiệu để thể hiện sự giàu có)
vocab.example: I try to avoid conspicuous consumption, so I only buy branded footwear when the quality truly surpasses generic alternatives.

vocab.meaning: uy tín/vị thế của thương hiệu
vocab.example: The brand prestige associated with Italian leather shoes is something that many professionals value in a formal setting.

vocab.meaning: bền vững theo thời gian (về cả chất lượng và kiểu dáng)
vocab.example: High-end boots are designed to stand the test of time, unlike fast-fashion shoes that fall apart after a few months.

vocab.meaning: lợi ích về mặt chỉnh hình/xương khớp
vocab.example: Famous athletic brands often consult podiatrists to ensure their designs provide maximum orthopedic benefits.
The market is unfortunately flooded with counterfeit goods, which is why I only purchase from official boutiques.
Sneaker enthusiasts often queue for hours just to get their hands on a highly anticipated limited-edition release.

vocab.meaning: đắt đỏ một cách vô lý/cắt cổ
vocab.example: Some designer sneakers are priced at an exorbitant level that doesn't necessarily reflect the actual cost of production.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng nguyên bản/không bị pha tạp
vocab.example: For me, buying from a reputable name is about seeking unadulterated quality and peace of mind.
